## What this does
Describe what changed and why.

## Azure DevOps Work Items
- Primary: AB#
- Additional (optional): AB#

## Conventional Commit PR Title
Use this pattern for the PR title:
- type(scope): summary

Allowed types:
- feat
- fix
- docs
- style
- refactor
- perf
- test
- build
- ci
- chore
- revert

## Risk Level
- [ ] low
- [ ] medium
- [ ] high

## Testing
List tests run and validation performed.

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format
- [ ] PR description includes at least one Azure DevOps work item (AB#12345)
- [ ] I linked work item(s) that reflect the scope of this PR
- [ ] I updated docs or follow-up tickets where needed
